USGS.Sites.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for USGS Instantaneous Values CloudEvents on the `usgs-iv` topic keyed by `{agency_cd}/{site_no}`.

USGS.Timeseries.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for USGS Instantaneous Values CloudEvents on the `usgs-iv` topic keyed by `{agency_cd}/{site_no}/{parameter_cd}/{timeseries_cd}`.

USGS.IV.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for USGS Instantaneous Values CloudEvents using the source's documented topic hierarchy and retain settings.

USGS.IV.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for usgs-iv CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

USGS.Sites.Site.name: Site
USGS.Sites.Site.description: A reference record for one United States streamgages and other monitoring site published by the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It fires when the bridge publishes or refreshes the station catalog so consumers can interpret measurement events.

USGS.Sites.description: Events from USGS Instantaneous Values covering United States streamgages and other monitoring sites and their current measurements. Use the reference records to identify stations and the measurement records for the latest observations.

USGS.Sites.SiteTimeseries.name: SiteTimeseries
USGS.Sites.SiteTimeseries.description: A reference record for one United States streamgages and other monitoring site published by the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It fires when the bridge publishes or refreshes the station catalog so consumers can interpret measurement events.

USGS.SiteTimeseries.description: Events from USGS Instantaneous Values covering United States streamgages and other monitoring sites and their current measurements. Use the reference records to identify stations and the measurement records for the latest observations.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.OtherParameter.name: OtherParameter
USGS.InstantaneousValues.OtherParameter.description: A other parameter event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.Precipitation.name: Precipitation
USGS.InstantaneousValues.Precipitation.description: A precipitation event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.Streamflow.name: Streamflow
USGS.InstantaneousValues.Streamflow.description: A current measurement from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API for one monitoring site. It carries instantaneous water observations such as gauge height, discharge, and temperature when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.GageHeight.name: GageHeight
USGS.InstantaneousValues.GageHeight.description: A gage height event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.WaterTemperatur.name: WaterTemperature
USGS.InstantaneousValues.WaterTemperatur.description: A current measurement from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API for one monitoring site. It carries instantaneous water observations such as gauge height, discharge, and temperature when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.DissolvedOxygen.name: DissolvedOxygen
USGS.InstantaneousValues.DissolvedOxygen.description: A dissolved oxygen event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.pH.name: pH
USGS.InstantaneousValues.pH.description: A p h event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.SpecificConduct.name: SpecificConductance
USGS.InstantaneousValues.SpecificConduct.description: A specific conductance event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.Turbidity.name: Turbidity
USGS.InstantaneousValues.Turbidity.description: A turbidity event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.AirTemperature.name: AirTemperature
USGS.InstantaneousValues.AirTemperature.description: A air temperature event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.WindSpeed.name: WindSpeed
USGS.InstantaneousValues.WindSpeed.description: A wind speed event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.WindDirection.name: WindDirection
USGS.InstantaneousValues.WindDirection.description: A wind direction event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.RelativeHumidit.name: RelativeHumidity
USGS.InstantaneousValues.RelativeHumidit.description: A relative humidity event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.BarometricPress.name: BarometricPressure
USGS.InstantaneousValues.BarometricPress.description: A barometric pressure event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.TurbidityFNU.name: TurbidityFNU
USGS.InstantaneousValues.TurbidityFNU.description: A turbidity f n u event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.fDOM.name: fDOM
USGS.InstantaneousValues.fDOM.description: A f d o m event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.ReservoirStorag.name: ReservoirStorage
USGS.InstantaneousValues.ReservoirStorag.description: A current reservoir record from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It reports the latest storage, elevation, capacity, or related reservoir status available for one reservoir.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.LakeElevationNG.name: LakeElevationNGVD29
USGS.InstantaneousValues.LakeElevationNG.description: A lake elevation n g v d29 event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.WaterDepth.name: WaterDepth
USGS.InstantaneousValues.WaterDepth.description: A current measurement from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API for one monitoring site. It carries instantaneous water observations such as gauge height, discharge, and temperature when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.EquipmentStatus.name: EquipmentStatus
USGS.InstantaneousValues.EquipmentStatus.description: A equipment status event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.TidallyFiltered.name: TidallyFilteredDischarge
USGS.InstantaneousValues.TidallyFiltered.description: A tidally filtered discharge event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.WaterVelocity.name: WaterVelocity

It carries instantaneous water observations such as gauge height, discharge, and temperature when the upstream feed reports a new or refreshed value.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.EstuaryElevatio.name: EstuaryElevationNGVD29
USGS.InstantaneousValues.EstuaryElevatio.description: A estuary elevation n g v d29 event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.LakeElevationNA.name: LakeElevationNAVD88
USGS.InstantaneousValues.LakeElevationNA.description: A lake elevation n a v d88 event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.Salinity.name: Salinity
USGS.InstantaneousValues.Salinity.description: A salinity event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.GateOpening.name: GateOpening
USGS.InstantaneousValues.GateOpening.description: A gate opening event from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API. It represents source data for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites as published by the upstream feed.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.description: Events from USGS Instantaneous Values covering United States streamgages and other monitoring sites and their current measurements. Use the reference records to identify stations and the measurement records for the latest observations.

USGS.Sites.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the USGS Instantaneous Values events. It carries the same station and measurement semantics as the source events, with MQTT topics arranged for source, water body, and station subscriptions where the manifest defines those segments.

USGS.SiteTimeseries.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the USGS Instantaneous Values events. It carries the same station and measurement semantics as the source events, with MQTT topics arranged for source, water body, and station subscriptions where the manifest defines those segments.

USGS.InstantaneousValues.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the USGS Instantaneous Values events. It carries the same station and measurement semantics as the source events, with MQTT topics arranged for source, water body, and station subscriptions where the manifest defines those segments.

USGS.Sites.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 transport variant for usgs-iv events. It carries the same CloudEvents and payload schemas as the source events on one broker address for queue- and topic-oriented consumers.

subject.description: AMQP message subject — stable entity identifier matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key for this event family.

schema.name: Site

agency_cd.description: USGS or partner agency code for the site. Combined with `site_no`, it forms the stable site identity used in CloudEvents subjects and transport keys.

site_no.description: USGS site number within the agency. Combined with `agency_cd`, it uniquely identifies the monitoring location.

station_nm.description: Human-readable site name published by USGS. Use `agency_cd` and `site_no` for stable joins because names can change.

site_tp_cd.description: USGS site-type code describing the kind of monitoring location, such as stream, lake, well, or atmospheric site.

lat_va.description: Latitude in degrees-minutes-seconds text as published by USGS.

long_va.description: Longitude in degrees-minutes-seconds text as published by USGS.

dec_lat_va.description: Latitude in decimal degrees when USGS provides decimal coordinates.

dec_long_va.description: Longitude in decimal degrees when USGS provides decimal coordinates.

coord_meth_cd.description: USGS method code describing how the latitude and longitude were determined.

coord_acy_cd.description: USGS accuracy code for the published coordinates.

coord_datum_cd.description: Horizontal datum code for the degrees-minutes-seconds coordinates.

dec_coord_datum_cd.description: Horizontal datum code for the decimal coordinates.

district_cd.description: USGS district code responsible for or associated with the site.

state_cd.description: FIPS state code for the site location.

county_cd.description: FIPS county code for the site location.

country_cd.description: Country code for the site location.

huc_cd.description: Hydrologic Unit Code identifying the watershed containing the site.

instruments_cd.description: USGS code summarizing the instrumentation installed at the site.

tz_cd.description: Time-zone code used for local timestamps at the site.

local_time_fg.description: Flag indicating whether timestamps are reported in the site local time zone.

reliability_cd.description: USGS reliability code describing the expected reliability of the site data.

project_no.description: USGS project number associated with the site, when provided.

schema.description: Reference details for one monitoring station or site in the USGS Instantaneous Values source.

description: USGS Instantaneous Values publishes instantaneous water observations such as gauge height, discharge, and temperature from the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) Water Services API for United States streamgages and other monitoring sites. These events let consumers build real-time monitoring, alerting, and operational dashboards without polling the upstream API directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for USGS Instantaneous Values, including upstream API context and bridge deployment notes.
